name: space metric schema validator rejects a metric missing the required id field
command: mkdir -p space && printf 'metrics:\n  - {dimension: performance, source: x, unit: x, reporting_window: 1d, privacy: local-only, opt_in: false}\n' > space/metrics.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/validate-metric-schema.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*id' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
